title: T-046 — ncr_close_modal (parity, conditional dual-sign for critical)
prompt:
# T-046 — ncr_close_modal (parity)

PRD: §11.4 V-QA-NCR-005/006, §5.3 signature evidence, §13.2 e-signature, §8.5 traceability
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:385-466 (ncr_close_modal)

## Goal
NCR close modal with pre-close checklist + conditional dual-sign layout (when severity='critical' V-QA-NCR-006) using shared ESignBlock (T-039) and closeNcr Server Action (T-038). 1:1 parity vs prototype.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/ui/src/quality/NcrCloseModal.tsx (Client Component) wrapping shadcn Dialog.
2. Pre-close checklist (checks[]) rendered as read-only shadcn Checkbox list — server-computed booleans (rootCause present, immediateAction present, linked holds status); fail = block Close button.
3. rcCat (root_cause_category) Select bound to T-042 reference data.
4. Conditional dual-sign grid (isCritical → 1fr 1fr CSS grid): renders TWO ESignBlock components (T-039), one labelled 'QA' one labelled 'Production Manager'; if severity != critical, single ESignBlock.
5. closeNcr Server Action call (T-038) on Sign confirmation; on success, modal closes + page revalidates.
6. Wired into ncr_detail (T-044) via ?modal=close URL state.

## Prototype parity
Anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:385-466` (ncr_close_modal).
Parity checklist (verify all):
- Dialog (medium-wide)
- Pre-close checklist (4-6 items) — server-computed, read-only Checkbox list
- rootCauseCategory Select
- Conditional dual-sign grid for critical (two ESignBlock cards side-by-side)
- Single ESignBlock for non-critical
- Destructive action footer styling (border-top + danger button class)
- Sign button disabled until checklist all-true AND PIN verified (server-driven)

## Files
- packages/ui/src/quality/NcrCloseModal.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/src/quality/__tests__/NcrCloseModal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/app/quality/ncr/[id]/page.tsx [modify]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
1. Compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:385-466 — parity on structure (Dialog + checklist + rcCat Select + conditional dual-sign grid + destructive footer), visuals (shadcn Dialog/Form/Textarea/Select/Alert/Button only; Button variant='destructive' for Close action), interaction (Sign disabled until checklist + PIN; closeNcr Server Action on confirm) — RTL + checklist
2. Given severity='critical', when modal renders, then 2 ESignBlock components are rendered side-by-side and the closeNcr action requires both PINs to belong to distinct users (V-QA-NCR-006 enforced server-side; client preview banner shows 'Two signatures required')
3. Given severity!='critical', when modal renders, then exactly 1 ESignBlock is rendered
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: NcrCloseModal.test.tsx asserting parity + dual-sign grid for critical + single ESignBlock for non-critical + Sign disabled-until-server-verified before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter ui test NcrCloseModal'
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use a different sign primitive — must use shared ESignBlock T-039 (translation-notes §E-Signature; audit B §3)
- Do not compute signature_hash on client (server-only)
- Do not bypass server-side V-QA-NCR-006 same-user reject (translation-notes §Dual-Sign Pattern)
- Do not skip the checklist server-computed booleans (client-only checklist would be a security regression)

pipeline_inputs.description: NCR close modal with server-computed pre-close checklist + conditional dual-sign layout for critical (V-QA-NCR-006) using shared ESignBlock. 1:1 parity vs prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Client Component wrapping shadcn Dialog. Pre-close checklist is read-only shadcn Checkbox list driven by server-computed booleans (rootCause present, immediateAction present, linked holds status). rcCat Select bound to T-042 ncr_root_cause_categories. isCritical → 1fr 1fr CSS grid renders TWO ESignBlock components (T-039) side-by-side (QA + Production Manager labels); else single ESignBlock. closeNcr Server Action (T-038) on sign confirmation. Modal close + page revalidate on success. Wired into ncr_detail via ?modal=close. Destructive-action footer style with shadcn Button variant='destructive'. Translation-notes red-lines: server-side V-QA-NCR-006 reject same-user; closure_signature_hash server-computed; record locks (immutability) after close via DB trigger (T-038).
out_of_scope: Do not modify NCR Server Actions (T-038)
Do not implement CAPA workflow (P2 Epic 8G)
acceptance_criteria: Given the close modal renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:385-466 (ncr_close_modal), then it matches on structural parity (Dialog + server-computed checklist + rcCat Select + conditional dual-sign grid + destructive footer), visual parity (shadcn Dialog/Form/Textarea/Select/Alert/Button only, variant='destructive' for Close), and interaction parity (Sign disabled until checklist all-true AND PIN verified by server, closeNcr Server Action on confirm) — verified by RTL render plus parity checklist

Given severity='critical', when the modal renders, then 2 ESignBlock components are rendered in a side-by-side grid (QA + Production Manager) and the closeNcr action requires distinct second signer user_id (V-QA-NCR-006 server-side)
Given severity in {major, minor}, when the modal renders, then exactly 1 ESignBlock is rendered and only one PIN is required

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: NcrCloseModal.test.tsx asserting parity + dual-sign grid for critical + single ESignBlock for non-critical + Sign-disabled-until-server-verified before implementation
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not introduce a different sign primitive — must use shared ESignBlock T-039 (translation-notes §E-Signature; audit B §3)
Do not compute signature_hash on client
Do not bypass server-side V-QA-NCR-006 same-user reject (translation-notes §Dual-Sign Pattern)
Do not skip server-computed checklist booleans (client-only checklist is security regression)
